invariants.name: No Double Payout
invariants.description: Once a match reaches Completed state, payout must occur exactly once
invariants.assertion: For all Match m in Completed state: execute_payout called exactly once AND (winner is set AND vested_at is set)
validation: submit_result or finalize_match or resolve_dispute_by_vote sets state=Completed AND executes payout atomically
claim_vested_payout cannot trigger another payout (only sets claim flag)
No re-entry possible: Completed is terminal state
invariants.potential_violation: If execute_payout could be called multiple times for same match
invariants.mitigation: State transition to Completed is atomic with payout; no separate payout call possible

invariants.name: No Fund Loss
invariants.description: Total escrowed tokens <= contract balance at all times
invariants.assertion: SUM(escrow_balance_of(m) for all m in DB) <= token.balanceOf(contract)
validation: deposit: tokens transferred from player to contract (increases escrow)
execute_payout: tokens transferred from contract to winner(s) (decreases escrow)
cancel_match / expire_match: tokens refunded to depositors (decreases escrow to 0)
All state transitions preserve escrow_balance_of(m) until terminal state
invariants.potential_violation: Arithmetic overflow in stake calculations; missing refunds in cancel/expire
invariants.mitigation: Uses checked_mul/checked_add; all refund paths covered

invariants.name: No Unreachable-But-Fundable States
invariants.description: No match can be stuck with non-zero escrow in a non-terminal state with no legal transition
invariants.assertion: For all Match m: if escrow_balance_of(m) > 0 then (m.state in [Active, PendingResult, Paused] AND valid_transition_exists)
validation: Pending: can transition to Active (deposit) or Cancelled (cancel/expire) - ALWAYS REACHABLE
Active: can transition to PendingResult (submit_result), Completed (submit_result w/ dispute=0), or Paused (pause_match)
PendingResult: can transition to Completed (finalize_match or resolve_dispute) - ALWAYS REACHABLE
Paused: can transition back to Active (resume_match) - ALWAYS REACHABLE
Completed/Cancelled: terminal, funds disbursed
invariants.potential_violation: If oracle unavailable or dispute voting blocked indefinitely
invariants.mitigation: PendingResult has deadline for finalization; dispute period can be set to 0 for immediate payout

invariants.name: Monotonic State Progression
invariants.description: Matches progress monotonically toward terminal states (no backwards transitions except Paused<->Active)
invariants.assertion: For all Match m: (Pending -> Active -> PendingResult -> Completed) OR (Pending -> Cancelled) OR (Active -> Paused <-> Active -> PendingResult -> Completed)
validation: Pending can only go to Active or Cancelled
Active can go to PendingResult, Completed (if dispute=0), or Paused
Paused can only return to Active
Once PendingResult, must go to Completed (terminal)
invariants.potential_violation: Match stuck in non-terminal state indefinitely
invariants.mitigation: Dispute period deadline; timeout for pending matches; admin can adjust settings

invariants.name: Deposit Idempotency
invariants.description: A player cannot deposit twice for the same match
invariants.assertion: For all Match m: if player1_deposited then deposit(player1) fails with AlreadyFunded
validation: deposit checks: is_p1 && m.player1_deposited -> Err(AlreadyFunded)
deposit checks: is_p2 && m.player2_deposited -> Err(AlreadyFunded)
invariants.potential_violation: Duplicate deposits could inflate escrow balance or allow replay
invariants.mitigation: Deposit flags prevent re-entry; token transfer is atomic

invariants.name: Authorization Boundaries
invariants.description: Only authorized parties can trigger state transitions or modify admin settings
assertions: pause_match / resume_match require caller.require_auth() where caller is player
validation: Soroban SDK's require_auth() enforces caller signature
No public entry point transitions state without proper auth
invariants.potential_violation: Unauthorized state transitions; oracle impersonation
invariants.mitigation: require_auth() gates all sensitive operations

invariants.name: Winner Uniqueness in Payout
invariants.description: Payout distributes funds based on exactly one winner (Player1, Player2, or Draw)
invariants.assertion: execute_payout matches exactly one Winner variant and transfers correct amount
validation: Winner::Player1 -> transfer full pot to player1
Winner::Player2 -> transfer full pot to player2
Winner::Draw -> transfer stake_amount to each player (total = 2x stake)
invariants.potential_violation: Ambiguous winner; incorrect payout amount
invariants.mitigation: Winner is enum (exhaustive match); amount calculated deterministically

invariants.name: Escrow Balance Conservation
invariants.description: Total payout to winners equals total escrowed balance before payout
invariants.assertion: For Winner w and Match m: payout_amount(w, m.stake_amount) == 2 * m.stake_amount (always full pot)
validation: Player1 wins: transfer 2*stake -> winner gets full pot
Player2 wins: transfer 2*stake -> winner gets full pot
Draw: transfer stake + stake -> both players get stake (total 2x)
invariants.potential_violation: Partial payouts; funds retained in contract
invariants.mitigation: Payout calculation is deterministic; all funds must leave contract

invariants.name: Oracle Result Integrity
invariants.description: Oracle-submitted results cannot be modified after PendingResult state entered
invariants.assertion: Once submit_result sets Match.winner and Match.vested_at, these values are immutable until dispute resolution
validation: PendingWinner stored separately; Match.winner set atomically with state transition
dispute_oracle_result cannot change winner (only raises dispute for voting)
resolve_dispute_by_vote either upholds original winner or overturns to Draw
invariants.potential_violation: Winner changed mid-dispute; tampered results
invariants.mitigation: Immutable storage; all winner changes occur within resolved disputes

invariants.name: Dispute Period Enforcement
invariants.description: Results in PendingResult state cannot be finalized before dispute deadline
invariants.assertion: finalize_match(m) only succeeds if current_ledger >= ResultDeadline(m.id)
validation: submit_result stores ResultDeadline = current_ledger + dispute_period
finalize_match checks: current_ledger >= deadline else DisputePeriodNotElapsed
vote_on_dispute checks: current_ledger < voting_deadline else VotingPeriodElapsed
invariants.potential_violation: Premature finalization; players locked out of disputes
invariants.mitigation: Ledger check blocks early finalization

invariants.name: Single Vote Per Voter Per Dispute
invariants.description: Each address can vote at most once per dispute
invariants.assertion: For Dispute d and Address voter: vote_on_dispute(d, voter, _) called > 1 times fails with AlreadyVoted
validation: vote_on_dispute stores DisputeVote(dispute_id, voter)
Check: has(&DisputeVote(...)) ? Err(AlreadyVoted) : store_vote
invariants.potential_violation: Vote splitting; voter weight inflation
invariants.mitigation: Vote key includes both dispute_id and voter; prevents duplicates

invariants.name: Tier-Based Stake Bounds
invariants.description: Players can only create/join matches within their current tier's stake range
validation: create_match calls require_player_tier_for_stake(player1, stake) and require_player_tier_for_stake(player2, stake)
deposit calls require_player_tier_for_stake(player, m.stake_amount)
invariants.potential_violation: Players bypass tier restrictions; high-risk matches for low-tier players
invariants.mitigation: Tier validation on creation and deposit

invariants.name: Token Allowlist Enforcement
invariants.description: If allowlist is enforced (AllowlistEnforced=true), only allowlisted tokens can be used in new matches
invariants.assertion: If AllowlistEnforced then (create_match(token) only succeeds if is_token_allowed(token))
validation: create_match checks: if allowlist_enforced && !is_token_allowed(token) -> Err(TokenNotAllowed)
Allowlist enforced automatically when first token is added (AllowlistEnforced flips to true)
invariants.potential_violation: Unvetted tokens used in matches; fake tokens accepted
invariants.mitigation: Admin controls allowlist; enabled by first token addition

invariants.name: Match ID Uniqueness
invariants.description: Each match receives unique auto-incrementing ID; no two matches share ID
invariants.assertion: For all Match m, m': m.id == m'.id => m == m'
validation: MatchCount auto-increments: checked_add(MatchCount, 1)
Each Match assigned current MatchCount before increment
Overflow check prevents ID collision
invariants.potential_violation: Duplicate match IDs; state collisions
invariants.mitigation: checked_add prevents wraparound

invariants.name: Game ID Uniqueness
invariants.description: Each on-chain game ID is linked to at most one match
invariants.assertion: For all game_id g: (persistent.has(GameId(g)) && persistent.get(Match(m)).game_id == g) => unique m
validation: create_match checks: has(&DataKey::GameId(game_id)) ? Err(DuplicateGameId) : create
GameId stored as persistent key to prevent re-use
invariants.potential_violation: Same game ID links to multiple matches; ambiguous oracle results
invariants.mitigation: GameId uniqueness check on creation

invariants.name: Player Identity Separation
invariants.description: player1 and player2 must be distinct addresses (no self-matches)
invariants.assertion: create_match(player1, player2, ...) only succeeds if player1 != player2 && player2 != contract
validation: create_match checks: player1 == player2 ? Err(InvalidPlayers) : continue
create_match checks: player2 == contract_address ? Err(InvalidPlayers) : continue
invariants.potential_violation: Self-match; player matches contract; fund trapping
invariants.mitigation: Identity checks on creation

invariants.name: Positive Stake Amount
invariants.description: Stake amounts must be positive (> 0)
validation: create_match checks: stake_amount <= 0 ? Err(InvalidAmount) : continue
Tier validation only accepts values in valid ranges (all > 0)
invariants.potential_violation: Zero or negative stakes; infinite pot vulnerability
invariants.mitigation: Positive amount validation on creation

invariants.name: Valid Match State Enum
invariants.description: Match.state is always one of exactly 6 variants (Pending, Active, PendingResult, Completed, Cancelled, Paused)
invariants.assertion: For all Match m: m.state in {Pending, Active, PendingResult, Completed, Cancelled, Paused}
validation: MatchState is Rust enum with exhaustive match required
Compiler enforces only valid variants
invariants.potential_violation: Invalid state value; undefined behavior
invariants.mitigation: Type system prevents invalid states

invariants.name: Timeout Bounds
invariants.description: Match timeout is within valid range [17280, 1555200] ledgers
validation: set_match_timeout checks: timeout < MIN || timeout > MAX ? Err(InvalidTimeout) : set
expire_match uses current_match_timeout() which defaults to DEFAULT_MATCH_TIMEOUT_LEDGERS if not set
invariants.potential_violation: Excessive/insufficient timeout; funds trapped/prematurely expired
invariants.mitigation: Bounded range validation; admin can adjust

invariants.name: Contract Pause Blocks Mutations
invariants.description: When Paused=true, create_match, deposit, and submit_result are blocked
validation: Reading Paused flag on every sensitive operation
pause/unpause are admin-only and extend instance TTL
invariants.potential_violation: New matches or deposits accepted while paused
invariants.mitigation: Explicit pause checks on all mutation entry points

note: 20 critical safety and liveness invariants for formal verification
